notes:
- Installer now repoints the browser extension at the installed matata-host.exe
- Fixes the case where the extension kept talking to a dev-tree matata-host.exe
  spawning a separate matata-gui.exe instance whose state didn't persist
- Preserves existing chromium / Firefox extension IDs across upgrades
- Uninstall cleans up Chrome/Edge/Chromium/Brave/Firefox HKCU registrations
